about.title: About me
text: I enjoy working on large, challenging projects that test my skills and let me learn new things. I especially like desktop and video game development, although I also have experience with web and mobile applications. In my free time, I like to learn about new technologies and expand my knowledge across different areas of computing. I am a creative, curious person always ready to take on new challenges.

projects.title: Projects
items: a Street Fighters-like fighting game with math operations
an example online store with database and authentication
the Pictionary-like game but made in MAUI, using SignalR Hubs for real-time multiplayer.
